intro: I am applying for the Dynatrace Lead role. My background aligns closely with enterprise observability, Dynatrace monitoring, dashboard standardization, alert calibration, operational readiness, and enablement across application and infrastructure teams.
body: At G6 Hospitality, I managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and other critical production systems. I implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile platforms, and led a Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 upgrade with TLS 1.2 enforcement and zero production monitoring regression.

At CITI, I supported observability and capacity monitoring across more than 6,000 endpoints using BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA Wily, AppDynamics, and Python-based telemetry workflows. I integrated multiple monitoring feeds into unified reporting layers, developed dashboards and operational reports, and worked with infrastructure, application, and operations teams to improve monitoring visibility and reporting consistency.

Earlier, as a CA APM SME for TIAA-CREF, I managed large enterprise APM environments with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents. I also led APM upgrade initiatives, created dashboards, alerts, and SLA thresholds, and produced documentation and knowledge transfer used by client teams. This experience maps well to a Dynatrace Lead role focused on observability governance, onboarding, dashboards, alerts, runbooks, and team enablement.
conclusion: I would welcome the opportunity to contribute my Dynatrace, APM, telemetry, and financial-services monitoring experience to your observability program.
